---
title: "Research"
listing:
    - id: publications
      contents: 
        - publications/*.yml
      type: custom
      sort:
        - "date desc"
      page-size: 100
      categories: false
      template: publications.ejs
    - id: grants
      contents: 
        - grants/*.yml
      type: custom
      sort:
        - "date desc"
      page-size: 100
      categories: false
      template: grants.ejs
page-navigation: false
title-block-banner: false
css: research.css
---

## Selected Publications

<div class="publication-filters" aria-label="Filter publications by category">
  <button type="button" class="publication-filter is-active" data-publication-filter="all">All</button>
  <button type="button" class="publication-filter" data-publication-filter="Quantum">Quantum</button>
  <button type="button" class="publication-filter" data-publication-filter="Learning">Learning</button>
  <button type="button" class="publication-filter" data-publication-filter="Verification">Verification</button>
  <button type="button" class="publication-filter" data-publication-filter="Grid Dynamics">Grid Dynamics</button>
  <button type="button" class="publication-filter" data-publication-filter="EMT">EMT</button>
  <button type="button" class="publication-filter" data-publication-filter="Microgrids">Microgrids</button>
  <button type="button" class="publication-filter" data-publication-filter="Journal">Journal</button>
  <button type="button" class="publication-filter" data-publication-filter="Conference">Conference</button>
  <button type="button" class="publication-filter" data-publication-filter="Book Chapter">Book Chapter</button>
</div>

::: {#publications}
:::

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  const filterButtons = document.querySelectorAll("[data-publication-filter]");
  const filterControls = document.querySelectorAll(".publication-filter");
  const publicationItems = document.querySelectorAll("#listing-publications .publication-item");

  function applyPublicationFilter(category) {
    filterControls.forEach((button) => {
      button.classList.toggle("is-active", button.dataset.publicationFilter === category);
    });

    publicationItems.forEach((item) => {
      const itemCategories = Array.from(item.querySelectorAll(".publication-tag")).map((tag) => tag.dataset.publicationFilter);
      item.hidden = category !== "all" && !itemCategories.includes(category);
    });
  }

  filterButtons.forEach((button) => {
    button.addEventListener("click", function () {
      applyPublicationFilter(button.dataset.publicationFilter);
    });
  });
});
</script>

## Grants
::: {#grants}
:::
